raw_source.title: [江浙沪] unifra诚聘 PD Manager
raw_source.body:
## 公司/团队介绍

unifra是一家web3.0时代的基础设施服务商，为企业提供web3.0时代的类阿里云/AWS服务。

web3.0改变了数字内容和数据控制权，为企业提供了新型的基础架构思路，开发者对基础设施服务商提出了新需求。在web3.0的范式下，基础设施服务需要具备高一致性/可靠性/扩展性/易用性，解决区块链环境下的调试效率低、用户参与度低、获取通知的效率低等问题。

unifra提供的服务主要包括：①DRPC，去中心化的高速稳定的公链节点服务；②API gateway，封装好的sdk级别的开发工具，集成monitor、notification、debugging、智能合约相关的服务；③增值服务，比如针对NFT等数据场景的增值服务。
团队全部由大厂组成。

## 薪资福利待遇
可面谈。
此项必须填写，否则 Rebase 公众号和其它媒体渠道可能不会转发。

## 地点

- 工作地点：江浙沪优先， 可远程
- 联系方式：hr@unifra.io

## 工作性质

- 是否全职：是
- 是否远程：是

## 岗位要求、职责
Product Manager

Responsibilities:

Define, prioritize, and execute on the product roadmap
Research and analyze the market, users, and new products
Own the product development from scratch to the end
Discover the user needs and develop products to meet those needs
Define product design and user experiences
Cooperate closely within our team (engineering, UI/UX, etc.) 
Communicate internally and externally 

What We're Looking For:

At leas 3 years experience as a Product Manager, experience with developer tools a plus
Technical background: bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or 1+ years of experience as a software engineer is preferred
Experience owning and driving a product roadmap
Interest in and focus on building innovative tools
Good communication skillls and critical thinking
Experience in web3 is a plus, passionate to join in start-up company
